title: raxopitys cunninghamii
intro: Raxopitys cunninghamii, also known as the 'Native Sarsaparilla', is a flowering plant native to Australia. It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used to treat a variety of ailments, including rheumatism, eczema, and skin irritations, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is rich in saponins, which have been shown to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Raxopitys cunninghamii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
